# Test Image Placeholder

This file represents where test image files would be stored for upload testing.

In a real implementation, you would place actual image files here:
- test-image.jpg (JPEG format)
- test-image.png (PNG format)  
- test-image.webp (WebP format)
- malicious-file.php (for security testing)
- oversized-image.jpg (for size limit testing)

For now, tests will generate these files programmatically using Buffer.from() with appropriate file signatures.
